subject: Project Management
title: Outside View Estimation
description: Learn Outside View Estimation in one minute.

hook.text: The outside view asks: forget your plan — what actually happened to similar projects?

buildup.text: Find 10 comparable projects. Check their actual timelines and costs. Use the median as your baseline.

discovery.text: The outside view is uncomfortable because it often says your project will take twice as long as planned.

twist.text: Teams almost always reject the outside view at first. It contradicts their carefully constructed plan.

climax.text: The outside view doesn't feel right. That's exactly why it works — it bypasses the brain's optimism filter.

punchline.text: The uncomfortable estimate is usually the accurate one.

quiz.question: What makes outside view estimation effective?
options: It uses data from comparable projects instead of the team's optimistic plan
It asks the client to set the deadline
